title: US Launches Its First Nuclear Reactor Built From Scratch in Decades
text: The first nuclear reactor built from scratch in the U.S. in decades has entered operation at a power plant in Georgia, which could present opportunities for the nuclear industry and investors.

title: Warren Buffett Scoops Up More of Dominion -- What More Is Left to Buy of This Energy Giant?
text: Dominion Energy has been working on a corporate overhaul, but hasn't provided investors with many details. Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway just purchased Dominion's stake in an LNG export facility.

title: Need an Extra $4,000 in Dividends Each Year? Invest $68,000 in These 3 Stocks.
text: Organon, Dominion Energy, and AT&T are all high-yielding stocks that pay more than 5%. Organon and Dominion have stable businesses that should provide consistent results.

title: Dominion Energy (D) Sells 50% Stake in Cove Point LNG for $3.5B
text: Dominion Energy (D) decided to sell its stake in Cove Point LNG to focus on core regulated utility operations.

title: Warren Buffett Is Betting Another $3.3 Billion on a Fossil Fuel-Filled Future
text: Berkshire Hathaway is increasing its stake in an LNG export facility. The move continues the company's growing bet on fossil fuels.

title: Warren Buffett company takes majority stake in Maryland LNG facility
text: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Energy announced an agreement to buy Dominion Energy Inc's stake in the Cove Point liquefied natural gas (LNG) export project in Maryland for $3.3 billion in cash. The deal will increase Berkshire Hathaway Energy's limited partnership ownership of the terminal to 75%, while a unit of Brookfield Infrastructure Partners holds the remaining 25%, Berkshire Hathaway Inc (NYSE:BRK.A) stated on Monday.

title: Warren Buffett Bets On LNG, Despite Low Gas Prices, With This $3 Billion Deal
text: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Energy announced a $3.3 billion deal to buy Dominion Energy's stake in the Cove Point LNG export facility.

title: 3 Stocks That Are Down Big Despite the 2023 Market Rally
text: Plug Power, a leader in hydrogen and fuel cell solutions, consistently fails to post profits. The sell-off in Dominion Energy is overdone, and the stock offers a hefty dividend yield.

title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Energy unit to buy LNG terminal stake for $3.3 billion
text: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Inc's (NYSE:BRK.A) energy unit has agreed to buy Dominion Energy's stake in the Cove Point liquefied natural gas (LNG) export project in Maryland for $3.3 billion. The deal will boost the company's limited partnership ownership of the project to 75%, with a unit of Brookfield Infrastructure Partners holding the remaining 25%.

title: Dominion Energy sells remaining stake in Cove Point LNG facility for $3.5 bln
text: Dominion Energy said on Monday it has agreed to sell its remaining 50% stake in Cove Point liquefied natural gas (LNG) facility to Berkshire Hathaway Energy for $3.5 billion.

title: Dominion Energy Announces Sale of Remaining Interest in Cove Point
text: Consistent with the priorities & commitments of ongoing business review Sale expected to close by year-end 2023, subject to standard HSR clearance Highly credit accretive; 100% of after-tax proceeds are expected to be used to retire debt RICHMOND, Va. , July 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) today announced that it has concluded a robust and competitive sale process and executed a definitive agreement to sell its 50% noncontrolling limited partner interest in Cove Point LNG, LP, to Berkshire Hathaway Energy, which currently operates the facility and owns a 100% general partner and 25% limited partner interest.

title: Dominion's 5% Yield: Is The Juice Worth The Squeeze?
text: Dominion Energy, a utility giant with a market cap of $44 billion, is facing regulatory issues, a potential debt downgrade, and sector challenges. It has cut its dividend but still yields 5.1%. The company is undergoing a major business review to improve its operations and boost its stock price. However, its credit rating is currently BBB+, one step below the A-range, with a negative outlook from S&P. Despite operating in a growing market and having potential for improvement, Dominion Energy's history of underperformance and lack of significant discounts compared to peers may deter investors.

title: Dominion Energy Schedules Second-Quarter 2023 Earnings Call
text: RICHMOND, Va. , July 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) will host its second-quarter 2023 earnings call at 10 a.m.

title: Dominion Energy warns customers to remain alert for utility scams
text: RICHMOND, Va. , July 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy is encouraging customers to be on alert against utility scams.

title: Dominion (D) Unit's Rate Cut Benefits Virginia Customers
text: Dominion Energy's (D) Virginia unit announces a rate decline, reducing residential customers' monthly charges by $14.

title: Why I Just Bought This 4% Yielding Dividend King
text: Black Hills is a relatively small utility. The company has rewarded investors with over 50 years of annual dividend growth.

title: Dominion Energy Virginia lowers customer rates beginning July 1
text: Residential customers will see $14 in average monthly savings Residential rates now 20% below national average, 39% below regional average Company separately initiates biennial base rate review, seeking no increase to base rates RICHMOND, Va., July 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Beginning July 1, Dominion Energy Virginia is lowering its rates by about $14 a month for typical residential customers, with lower rates also going into effect for non-residential customers.

title: Dominion (D) Lowers Q2 Earnings Guidance Due to Unplanned Outages
text: Dominion (D) lowers second-quarter 2023 operating earnings guidance due to mild weather and unplanned outages. The negatives have been offset marginally by positive factors such as lower costs.
